evals.prompt: The user says: 'Remember that I always prefer pnpm over npm across all my projects.' Where should this information be stored?
evals.expected_output: Routes to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (user-level, personal preference, all projects)
expectations: Routes to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md or user-level rules, NOT project CLAUDE.md
Identifies this as a human instruction (not a Claude learning)
Identifies this as cross-project (not repo-specific)
Identifies this as personal preference (not team-shared)
Does NOT route to auto-memory

evals.prompt: The user says: 'This project uses 2-space indentation for TypeScript files but 4-space for Python.' Where should this information be stored?
evals.expected_output: Routes to .claude/rules/ with path-specific frontmatter, or project CLAUDE.md
expectations: Routes to project-level storage (not user-level)
Considers .claude/rules/ with paths: frontmatter for file-type-specific loading
Identifies this as team-shared (checked into git), not personal
Does NOT route to auto-memory
Does NOT route to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md

evals.prompt: During debugging, Claude discovered that the project's auth tokens expire after exactly 30 minutes and the refresh endpoint is at /api/auth/refresh. This wasn't documented anywhere. Where should this be stored?
expectations: Routes to auto-memory, not CLAUDE.md or rules
Identifies this as a Claude learning/discovery (not a human instruction)
Suggests a topic file within auto-memory (not just MEMORY.md index)
Does NOT route to project CLAUDE.md

evals.prompt: The user says: 'My local database is at postgres://localhost:5432/myapp_dev — don't commit this anywhere shared.' Where should this be stored?
expectations: Routes to CLAUDE.local.md or similar gitignored location
Identifies this as personal (not team-shared)
Identifies this as project-specific (not global)
Does NOT route to ./CLAUDE.md (would be committed to git)
Acknowledges the sensitivity / do-not-share constraint

evals.prompt: The user says: 'All API endpoints in src/api/ must validate input with zod schemas before processing.' Where should this be stored?
evals.expected_output: Routes to .claude/rules/ with paths: frontmatter scoped to src/api/
expectations: Routes to project-level storage (rules or CLAUDE.md)
Considers .claude/rules/ with path-scoping to src/api/**
Identifies this as team-shared (checked into git)
Does NOT route to auto-memory or personal files
